channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in JavaScript (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in JavaScript nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 📜 NVIDIA/NemoClaw (13004 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: NVIDIA

📝 Repository: NVIDIA/NemoClaw

📄 Descrizione: NVIDIA plugin for secure installation of OpenClaw

⭐ Stelle: 13004

💻 Linguaggio: JavaScript

]]>

item.description:

item.title: 📜 ComposioHQ/secure-openclaw (1418 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: ComposioHQ

📝 Repository: ComposioHQ/secure-openclaw

📄 Descrizione: A personal 24x7 AI assistant like OpenClaw that runs on your messaging platforms. Send a message on WhatsApp, Telegram, Signal, or iMessage and get responses from Claude with full tool access, persistent memory, scheduled reminders, and integrations with 500+ apps.

⭐ Stelle: 1418

🍴 Forks: 227

💻 Linguaggio: JavaScript

🏷️ Topics: clawdbot clawdbot-security moltbot moltbot-skills openclaw openclaw-plugin openclaw-security openclaw-skills openclawd

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-02-08T07:55:07Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-03-09T01:09:34Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.description:
👤 Owner: fjb040911

📝 Repository: fjb040911/ai-rules

📄 Descrizione: ai-rules is a governance framework designed to solve "Architectural Decay" in AI-driven development. It forces AI Agents (Cursor, Windsurf, Copilot) to respect your project's boundaries, UI libraries, and design patterns.
